text:
Bob was so excited! He had won the lottery! The ticket slipped out of his pocket and onto the ground in front of him, lost among all the other tickets. He picked it up, stared at the number, and took a deep breath.

It read $million. Wow! What could he do with a million dollars? He thought about it for a minute and then had a bright idea. Maybe he could buy a nice vacation. He didn't really know anyone who lived there.

He bought the ticket. Of course, there was no way to withdraw the money now. He shrugged.

He wandered into the mall. The fancy shopping centers seemed right up his alley. He wandered around until he spotted a really stylish boutique. They always had the most outrageously expensive dresses.

He pushed open the door and saw a window displaying a gorgeous gown. He approached it.

The attendant, a young woman with dark curls tied back, smiled warmly.

"Well, hello there! How did you find us?"
